Off Calendar Nov-19-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENTS EAST BAY REGIONAL PARK DISTRICT, CALIFORNIA REGIONAL PARK DISTRICT'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/PROHIBITION/CERTIFICATION.

Off calendar. Dismissal as to the fourth and fifth causes of actions entered on October 29, 2025.
